settings.userPreferencesDescription: Control your language, default notification method, and confirmation behavior.
settings.requireCancellationConfirmationSubtitle: Show a confirmation dialog before canceling a subscription.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: These actions change local data immediately. Confirmation is required.
settings.dangerZoneHint: Use these actions only when you intentionally need a clean slate on this device.
settings.resetPortfolioSubtitle: Removes all subscriptions and transaction history, then restores the initial balance.
settings.resetPortfolioConfirmMessage: This removes holdings and transaction history from this device and resets your balance to COP 500000.
settings.resetPreferencesSubtitle: Restores language, notification method and confirmation settings to defaults.
settings.resetPreferencesConfirmMessage: This restores language, notification method, cancellation confirmation, and success snackbar settings.
settings.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone on this device.
settings.keepDataSemantics: Keep current data and close confirmation dialog

home.cancelDialogMessage: You will stop contributions to $fundName and $amount will return to your available balance.
home.holdingsSubtitle: Review your active subscriptions and cancel when needed.
home.holdingsErrorMessage: Please try again in a moment.
home.holdingsEmptyMessage: Your subscribed funds will appear here once you complete your first subscription.

funds.errorMessage: Check your connection and try again.
funds.emptyNoMatchMessage: Update your search or filter type to find a fund.
funds.emptyNoFundsMessage: Funds will appear here as soon as data is available.
funds.clearFilters: Clear filters and show all funds
funds.subscribeUnavailableSemantics: Subscribe to $fundName unavailable due to insufficient balance

transactions.title: Recent activity
transactions.subtitle: Latest subscriptions and cancellations
transactions.emptyMessage: Your buy and sell activity will appear here once you make your first movement.
